summary: Julia Evans announces that talk recordings and transcripts from !!Con have been posted online. She highlights the diverse range of topics covered at the conference, from EEG machines to dancing robots to hacking poetry. She credits Erty Seidel for doing the work of producing the talk recordings.
key_points: !!Con talk recordings and transcripts are now available online
The conference covered an eclectic mix of topics including EEG machines, type theory, dancing robots, and hacking poetry
Erty Seidel handled nearly all the work for producing the talk recordings
money_quotes: Go learn about EEG machines, how to stay in love with programming, type theory, dancing robots, hacking poetry, and more!
key_insight: !!Con featured an unusually diverse and playful range of technical talks, reflecting a community that values curiosity and joy in programming.
